name: resolver-e2-legacy-migration
description: ADR 0037 Phase V Wave 2 invariant — one-shot legacy migration from the five pre-resolver localStorage keys (`qualia.perfSettings`, `qualia.nodeDisplayMode`, `qualia.edgeShape`, `qualia.edgeRouting`, `qualia.userTouchedPerfFields`) into the unified `qualia.settings` blob. Test: clear `qualia.settings`, seed the legacy keys, reload, verify `qualia.settings` exists with merged content + legacy keys are gone.

commands: (() => { localStorage.removeItem('qualia.settings'); localStorage.setItem('qualia.perfSettings', JSON.stringify({ bloomStrength: 1.9 })); localStorage.setItem('qualia.nodeDisplayMode', JSON.stringify('circle')); localStorage.setItem('qualia.userTouchedPerfFields', JSON.stringify(['bloomStrength', 'nodeDisplayMode'])); return 'E2 setup: legacy keys seeded, qualia.settings cleared'; })()

actions.command: (async () => { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 800)); const blob = localStorage.getItem('qualia.settings'); if (!blob) throw new Error('post-reload: qualia.settings missing — migration did not run'); const parsed = JSON.parse(blob); if (!parsed.userOverrides || parsed.userOverrides.bloomStrength !== 1.9) throw new Error('post-reload: migrated bloomStrength expected 1.9, got: ' + JSON.stringify(parsed.userOverrides)); if (parsed.userOverrides.nodeDisplayMode !== 'circle') throw new Error('post-reload: migrated nodeDisplayMode expected circle, got: ' + parsed.userOverrides.nodeDisplayMode); const legacyKeys = ['qualia.perfSettings', 'qualia.nodeDisplayMode', 'qualia.userTouchedPerfFields']; const survivors = legacyKeys.filter(k => localStorage.getItem(k) !== null); if (survivors.length > 0) throw new Error('post-reload: legacy keys not cleaned up: ' + JSON.stringify(survivors)); return 'E2 pass: legacy keys merged into qualia.settings + removed'; })()
